meaning: n.喷管,喷口,水柱,喷流,管口v.喷出,滔滔不绝地讲,喷涌
examples: He replaced the boiler when the last one began to spout flames.
She lifted the kettle a little and tilted its spout over the tea-pot.
It was so much fun figuring out where to put the openings for the spout and handle!
Before long, we saw another spout, this time a humpback, as it came up for air.
Red-and-white checked linens cover high tables and well-versed waiters spout long lists of local beers and handcrafted sodas.
